title: Compress this diligence memo to its decision-relevant core
guidance: Reward the version that helps a partner reach a call, not the one that recaps the most.

runner_input.instruction: Compress the memo below to its decision-relevant core.
runner_input.constraints: Max 250 words. Lead with the investment thesis or red flag.

source_blocks.text: Synthetic SaaS Co. £14m ARR, 31% YoY growth. Priced at 8.5x ARR.

items: 91% gross retention, 108% net — sticky via compliance workflow
Founder-CTO single point of failure on a dated codebase
Mgmt projects 40% growth; pipeline only supports ~28%

rubric_notes: Should foreground key-person risk and the growth-bridge gap.
